requirements.text: The extension loads on session start when installed via omp install
requirements.acceptance: omp install completes; session_start fires and ctx.ui.notify shows ultramode loaded
Sets mode to on, persists state, triggers work selection
Sets mode to off, persists state, stops injecting phase commands
Outputs mode, bead ID, phase, retry count, last decision
Picks next ready bead and starts /create

requirements.text: On session_start with mode=on, selects work
requirements.acceptance: Calls runEphemeralTurn with bv triage + br scheduler output

requirements.text: On turn_end with mode=on, decides next action
requirements.acceptance: Calls runEphemeralTurn with decision prompt containing last output, phase, artifacts, retries
runEphemeralTurn is called; no regex matching of Next: markers
ctx.session.sendUserMessage is called with next phase command when decision is proceed
After /pr, mode set to idle, no /close injected
No code path injects /close; nextPhase terminal case is /pr
retries >= 3 triggers br update --status blocked and picks next bead
tool_call handler blocks edits outside worktree when active
appendCustomEntry persists state; getBranch reconstructs on session_start
ctx.ui.setWidget renders mode, bead ID, phase, retries

requirements.text: Decision prompt includes bv triage + br scheduler
requirements.acceptance: Both prompts include bv and br JSON output
Prompt includes PRD title, plan status, evidence status
Retries exhausted or reject triggers br update --status blocked
ctx.ui.notify on loop start, selection, phase advance, PR, blocked, stop
No conflicts with workflow-gate.ts or native-command-override.ts

success_criteria: omp install works and extension loads on session start
/ultramode on starts the loop and selects work via LLM decision
Phase chaining uses sendUserMessage and stops at /pr
Decisions use runEphemeralTurn, not string matching
Retry cap of 3 marks beads blocked and moves on
